scope: Art Gallery and UI Components Flow
interaction_flow: split-compare.js → ResizeObserver: observe(splitContainer) for dynamic skew recalc
split-compare.js → DOM: updateSplit(defaultPosition=50) — sets clip-path and divider left
User → split-compare.js: mousemove → handleMouseMove() → targetX update → startAnimation()
split-compare.js → Window: requestAnimationFrame(animate) → lerp currentX→targetX → updateSplit()
split-compare.js → split-compare.js: [threshold crossed] retriggerAnimations() — clone/replace or per-element CSS reset
foundation-grid.js → DOM: container.innerHTML = rendered foundation cards with plinth columns
section-nav.js → DOM: querySelectorAll('.section-nav-item') → items; map to sectionIds[]
section-nav.js → Window: addEventListener('scroll', throttled via requestAnimationFrame)
User → Window: scroll event → requestAnimationFrame(updateNav) [ticking guard]
updateNav → DOM: compute heroBottom, footerTop, viewportMiddle
updateNav → nav: classList.add/remove('is-visible') based on scroll position
updateNav → DOM: iterate sectionIds → find currentSection by offsetTop ≤ viewportMiddle
updateNav → DOM: build activeSections Set (sibling sections sharing same offsetTop ±4px)
updateNav → items: classList.add/remove('is-active') per activeSections membership
[art-gallery.js is NOT called from app.js init directly — called via separate entry]
renderFrame → demo-renderer.js: renderSkillDemo(skill.id) [if isReady] OR renderComingSoonVisual(id)
User → IntersectionObserver: frame enters viewport → update frames active class + dots active/aria-selected
key_relationships: app.js orchestrates: initLensEffect, initFoundationGrid, initSectionNav, loadContent
foundation-grid.js depends_on foundation-animations.js: foundationAnimations map (area→SVG string)
section-nav.js depends_on DOM: hero element, site-footer, section-nav, section-nav-items
split-compare.js uses ResizeObserver for responsive skew recalculation
conditional_logic: initSectionNav: guards on #section-nav and #hero; returns early if missing
renderFrame: focusAreas.length > 0 → renders up to 4 tag spans
split-compare retriggerAnimations: hasCanvas ? per-element CSS reset : clone-and-replace
split-compare threshold: wasAboveThreshold && !isAboveThreshold → retriggerAnimations + onCrossThreshold callback
section-nav updateNav: sibling sections with offsetTop within 4px all become active together
app.js DOMContentLoaded guard: readyState === 'loading' → addEventListener, else → init() directly
important_notes: initArtGallery() is a no-op stub; renderGallery(skills) is the real entry point and must be called with skills data externally. art-gallery.js is NOT imported in app.js — it is loaded separately. split-compare.js supports both mouse (lerp animation) and touch (drag with vertical-scroll pass-through at 10px threshold). SectionNav handles co-located sibling sections by grouping same offsetTop±4px. foundationGrid renders only the 'impeccable' skill dimensions.
